symptom: Weak or conflicted prompts: character face core overrode insert/action; tag-soup style lost shot size and constraints.
root_cause: No factory prompt-craft SSOT; agents wrote short adjective lists; shot_compose stacked cores burying action.
fix: Added docs/generation_prompt_craft.md + Rule 7.5 with ordered blocks, motion-only I2V, risk clauses, insert face-core omit.
prevention: Before every gen: Subject-Action-Light-Camera order; open generation_prompt_craft; insert risks without portrait core; failure_note on prompt FAIL.
